capabilities.name: Session Lifecycle And Project Tracking
capabilities.feature: Start, end, list, and disambiguate agent sessions with project context.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Verified for REST/CLI local runtime paths; long-running cross-agent lifecycle policy remains bounded by existing session tests.

capabilities.name: Memory Lifecycle
capabilities.feature: Save, search, retrieve, update, supersede, delete, consolidate, compress, subscribe, and auto-recall memories.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Verified for approved local agent proof paths; native Codex memory writes remain outside ping-mem unless explicitly re-enabled.

capabilities.name: Agent Identity, Scope, And Quotas
capabilities.feature: Register agents, attach identity to sessions, enforce scope, quotas, and write safety.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Approved path identity gates are verified; broader multi-agent orchestration and quota behavior need explicit live metrics.

capabilities.name: Codebase Ingestion And Registry
capabilities.feature: Ingest projects, verify manifests, list registered projects, delete project data, and preserve registry truth.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Verified for the approved registered roots; stale or ad hoc ingests must be identified by scope, not mixed into registered truth.

capabilities.name: Code Search, Timeline, And Structural Impact
capabilities.feature: Search indexed code, inspect git timeline, impact, blast radius, and dependency maps.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Search and structural modules exist with tests; every subtool still needs a live metric before broad product claims.

capabilities.name: Graph Relationships And Structured Answers
capabilities.feature: Return relationships, lineage, evolution, causal paths, semantic neighborhoods, and complete graph answers.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Structured answer semantics are verified; live Neo4j-backed relationship breadth still needs denominator metrics.

capabilities.name: Events, Worklog, And Streams
capabilities.feature: Record shell, worklog, diagnostic, git, memory, and subscription events with SSE delivery.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Routes and tests exist; live stream delivery and event coverage need explicit capability metrics.

capabilities.name: Diagnostics Intelligence
capabilities.feature: Ingest SARIF, list findings, diff runs, summarize, compare tools, and group findings by symbol.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Core diagnostics behavior is test-backed; live project diagnostics freshness needs a scorecard metric.

capabilities.name: Knowledge, Mining, Dreaming, And Profiles
capabilities.feature: Mine transcripts, generate deductions/generalizations, manage knowledge entries, and maintain user profile signals.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Modules exist, but this is not currently in the live capability claim until trigger paths and acceptance metrics are proven.

capabilities.name: Health, Doctor, Observability, And Recovery
capabilities.feature: Expose health, doctor gates, readiness, launchd hygiene, recovery scripts, and operator-visible degraded states.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Live local runtime readiness is verified; Mac sleep/wake remains explicitly human-in-the-loop where required.

capabilities.name: Web UI And Static Surfaces
capabilities.feature: Dashboard, memories, diagnostics, ingestion, agents, knowledge, sessions, events, worklog, health, and mining views.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Existing views are tested in pieces; capability metrics dashboard integration is tracked separately by issue #139.

capabilities.name: CLI And Approved Agent Entrypoints
capabilities.feature: Expose agent-safe CLI status, proofs, memory lifecycle, codebase, graph answer, and server commands.
capabilities.claimBoundary: The Codex-approved wrapper is verified; direct CLI/MCP paths remain quarantined unless explicitly claimed.

capabilities.name: MCP And Proxy Boundaries
capabilities.feature: Expose MCP streamable HTTP and proxy adapters as optional compatibility layers.
capabilities.claimBoundary: MCP remains optional and blocked/deferred for current trust claims; it must not inflate live capability scores.

capabilities.name: Docs And Operator Truth
capabilities.feature: Keep README, agent instructions, operator docs, environment guidance, and static surfaces aligned with live truth.
capabilities.claimBoundary: Docs have been quarantined and partially rewritten; final closure evidence and soak remain tracked by Wave 5.
